strategies.label: Block public access on bucket

dependency_checks.message: Validate direct bucket access dependencies before applying this strategy. Analyze the affected S3 bucket policy/ACL/public-access-block settings, the bucket KMS key policy/grants (if SSE-KMS), CloudFront OAC/OAI configuration, and any VPC endpoint or cross-account IAM principals that access the bucket. If IAM Access Analyzer is enabled in this account/region, this validation can be automated.

warnings: May break workloads that depend on direct public S3 access. Analyze the affected S3 bucket policy/ACL/public-access-block settings, the bucket KMS key policy/grants (if SSE-KMS), CloudFront OAC/OAI configuration, and any VPC endpoint or cross-account IAM principals that access the bucket. If IAM Access Analyzer is enabled in this account/region, dependency validation can be automated.
strategies.impact_text: All four bucket-level public access block settings will be enabled for this bucket.
blocked_reasons: Bucket website hosting is enabled; use the manual preservation path before enforcing Block Public Access.
Bucket policy is currently public; direct public-access preservation must be reviewed manually.
strategies.decision_rationale: Family resolver downgraded strategy 's3_bucket_block_public_access_standard' to manual S3.2 preservation profile 's3_bucket_block_public_access_manual_preservation'. Bucket website hosting is enabled; use the manual preservation path before enforcing Block Public Access. Bucket policy is currently public; direct public-access preservation must be reviewed manually.

strategies.label: Migrate to CloudFront + OAC + private S3

dependency_checks.message: Validate direct bucket access dependencies before applying this strategy. Analyze the affected S3 bucket policy/ACL/public-access-block settings, the bucket KMS key policy/grants (if SSE-KMS), CloudFront OAC/OAI configuration, and any VPC endpoint or cross-account IAM principals that access the bucket. If IAM Access Analyzer is enabled in this account/region, this validation can be automated.

warnings: Requires careful validation of bucket policies and KMS permissions. Analyze the affected S3 bucket policy/ACL/public-access-block settings, the bucket KMS key policy/grants (if SSE-KMS), CloudFront OAC/OAI configuration, and any VPC endpoint or cross-account IAM principals that access the bucket. If IAM Access Analyzer is enabled in this account/region, dependency validation can be automated.
strategies.impact_text: Bucket-level public access block settings will be enabled and access will be served through CloudFront + OAC.
strategies.decision_rationale: Family resolver kept executable S3.2 profile 's3_migrate_cloudfront_oac_private' for strategy 's3_migrate_cloudfront_oac_private'.

strategies.label: Keep intentionally public (exception path)

fields.description: How long should this exception remain active?
Why can't you apply this fix right now?
fields.placeholder: Describe the temporary business or operational constraint.

dependency_checks.message: Public access remains enabled; exception must include business approval and review date.

warnings: Keeps public exposure; requires explicit business approval and compensating controls.
strategies.impact_text: Bucket-level public access block settings remain unchanged while exception workflow is used.
strategies.decision_rationale: Compatibility resolver defaulted to the compatible profile 's3_keep_public_exception' for strategy 's3_keep_public_exception'.

recommendation.rationale: Matrix cell risk_high__criticality_high maps to default recommendation 'exception_review'. Risk is high and business criticality is high. Criticality evidence: data_sensitivity=0.80, privilege_level=0.60, internet_exposure=0.90, matched_signals=none. Relationship context is incomplete, so the recommendation remains conservative and advisory unless policy overrides it.
